title: JEE Main 2026 Results Out: Check Key Highlights And Toppers List
description: JEE Main Session 2 Result: Top scorers include Aarush Singhal (Chandigarh), Jonnala Roshan Manideep Reddy (Andhra Pradesh), Shreyas Mishra (Delhi), Mantha Shiva Kamesh (Telangana), and Siddharth Shrikant Athaley (Maharashtra)
